summary: Implement Publish default dry-run flow end-to-end: Approve transitions to PublishTask, executes publisher in dry-run by default, records audit trail, and persists digest output, while preserving loopback-only exposure settings and high-frequency no-deliver behavior.
rollbackPlan: Revert changes to server publish pipeline and task-state transition logic in socialos/apps/api/server.mjs to previous main behavior.
Remove/restore e2e smoke test additions in scripts/tests/e2e_smoke.mjs if they fail or prove unstable.
Revert documentation updates in socialos/apps/api/README.md and socialos/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md to last-known-good.
If needed, reset branch to lkg tag and re-run validation/test commands before re-merging.
digestBullets: Approve now emits a PublishTask that runs publisher in dry-run mode by default.
Publish execution path writes audit records and persists digest output for reporting.
No gateway exposure changes: loopback-only and high-frequency no-deliver constraints remain intact.
